title: carex gholsonii
intro: Carex gholsonii, also known as Gholson's sedge, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Cyperaceae. It is primarily used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and potentially aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis. Traditionally, Carex gholsonii is prepared as a tea or infusion, or used in salves and ointments to harness its medicinal properties.
